use_cases: AI assistant conversational input for web applications
Command or query input field for AI-powered tools and platforms
Smart text input with animated placeholder suggestions
Chat interface message composition with mode toggles
Interactive search input with think and deep search capabilities
ai_summary: A polished AI chat input component featuring animated cycling placeholder text, active/inactive states, and optional think/deep search mode toggles. Built with framer-motion for smooth transitions, it includes click-outside-to-close functionality and Lucide icons for common actions like send, mic, attach, and search. Ideal for integrating AI assistants or chat interfaces into SaaS and developer tool platforms.
